name: Berserker
instructions:
Gain a card costing less than this. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.
-----
When you gain this, if you have an Action in play, play this.

name: Border Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Cache
instructions:
$3
-----
When you gain this, gain 2 Coppers.

name: Cartographer
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them, then put the rest back in any order.

name: Cauldron
instructions:
$2
+1 Buy
The third time you gain an Action this turn, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Crossroads
instructions: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played a Crossroads this turn, +3 Actions.

name: Develop
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Gain two cards onto your deck, with one costing exactly $1 more than it, and one costing exactly $1 less than it, in either order.

name: Duchess
instructions:
+$2
Each player (including you) looks at the top card of their deck and may discard it.
-----
In games using this, when you gain a Duchy, you may gain a Duchess.

name: Embassy
instructions:
+5 Cards
Discard 3 cards.
-----
When you gain this, each other player gains a Silver.

name: Farmland
instructions:
2 VP
-----
When you gain this, trash a card from your hand and gain a non-Farmland card costing exactly $2 more than it.

name: Fool's Gold
instructions:
If this is the first time you played a Fool's Gold this turn, +$1, otherwise +$4.
-----
When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand, to gain a Gold onto your deck.

name: Guard Dog
instructions:
+2 Cards
If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand, +2 Cards.
-----
When another player plays an Attack, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Haggler
instructions:
+$2
This turn, when you gain a card, if you bought it, gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Highway
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
This turn, cards cost $1 less.

name: Ill-Gotten Gains
instructions:
$1
You may gain a Copper to your hand.
-----
When you gain this, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Inn
instructions:
+2 Cards
+2 Actions
Discard 2 cards.
-----
When you gain this, reveal any number of Action cards from your discard pile and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Jack of All Trades
instructions: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your hand.

name: Mandarin
instructions:
+$3
Put a card from your hand onto your deck.
-----
When you gain this, put all Treasures you have in play onto your deck in any order.

name: Margrave
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Buy
Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Noble Brigand
instructions:
+$1
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Silver or Gold you choose, discards the rest, and gains a Copper if they didn't reveal a Treasure. You gain the trashed cards.
-----
When you buy this, do its attack.

name: Nomad Camp
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$2
-----
This is gained onto your deck (instead of to your discard pile).

name: Nomads
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$2
-----
When you gain or trash this, +$2.

name: Oasis
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
Discard a card.

name: Oracle
instructions: Each player (including you) reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, and discards them or puts them back, your choice (they choose the order). Then, +2 Cards.

name: Scheme
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
This turn, you may put one of your Action cards onto your deck when you discard it from play.

name: Silk Road
instructions: Worth 1 VP for every 4 Victory cards you have (round down).

name: Souk
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$7
-$1 per card in your hand (you can't go below $0).
-----
When you gain this, trash up to 2 cards from your hand.

name: Spice Merchant
instructions: You may trash a Treasure from your hand to choose one: +2 Cards and +1 Action; or +1 Buy and +$2.

name: Stables
instructions: You may discard a Treasure, for +3 Cards and +1 Action.

name: Trader
instructions:
Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per $1 it costs.
-----
When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand, to exchange the card for a Silver.

name: Trail
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
-----
When you gain, trash, or discard this, other than in Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Tunnel
instructions:
2 VP
-----
When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may reveal it to gain a Gold.

name: Weaver
instructions:
Gain two Silvers or a card costing up to $4.
-----
When you discard this other than in Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Wheelwright
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may discard a card to gain an Action card costing as much as it or less.

name: Witch's Hut
instructions:
+4 Cards
Discard 2 cards, revealed. If they're both Actions, each other player gains a Curse.
